name: table
description: Advanced data table: multi-column type-aware sorting, global + per-column filtering, tree data and collapsible row groups with live aggregates, inline cell editing with Intl number/currency formatting, drag-and-drop row and column reordering, column resize/hide/pin, sticky header/footer/rows, grid keyboard navigation, CSV export, responsive stacked mode, and state persistence — every feature opt-in via data attributes

changes.note: Feature release: multi-sort, filtering, tree/grouping with aggregates, inline editing, row/column drag & drop, column resize/hide/pin, sticky header/footer, keyboard grid navigation, CSV export, responsive stack mode, state persistence. The 1.x API (sort, selectRow, selectAll, deselectAll, getSelected, destroy) and all 1.x markup keep working unchanged; ISO date columns now sort chronologically instead of by year.

tr.description: Table row. Optional: data-level (tree depth), data-row-id, data-pin='top' (sticky row)

th.description: Header cell with scope=col. Optional: data-sortable, data-type, data-format, data-align, data-editable, data-readonly, data-pin='start|end', data-hide-below='sm|md|lg', data-key, data-min-width, data-max-width, data-no-resize, data-csv-skip

td.description: Data cell. Optional: data-value (raw value), data-sort-value, data-format, data-align, data-editable, data-readonly, data-aggregate='sum|avg|min|max|count', data-col (aggregate column override), data-label (stack-mode label)

tfoot.description: Table footer for totals; cells with data-aggregate recompute live over visible rows

group-header.description: Category header row within grouped data; collapsible when the root has data-groupable, cells with data-aggregate + data-col show per-group totals

filter-row.description: Second thead row holding per-column filter inputs

filter-input.description: Per-column filter input inside the filter row (auto-bound, debounced; numeric columns accept >, >=, <, <=, =, !=, and a..b ranges)

filter.description: Global quick-filter input anywhere inside the root (auto-bound, debounced)

expander.description: Expand/collapse control for tree parents and group headers (auto-injected; leaf rows get an aligned placeholder span)

drag-handle.description: Row drag handle for pointer reordering; ArrowUp/ArrowDown on the focused handle moves the row

detail-row.description: Master/detail expansion row placed immediately after its data row; it moves with the row through sorts and drags

row-toggle.description: Button inside a data row that shows/hides its detail-row (aria-expanded reflects state)

empty.description: Empty-state row, shown automatically when no rows are visible (e.g. all filtered out)

cell-input.description: Inline cell editor input (created by the controller during editing)

resize-handle.description: Column resize grip (injected by the controller when the root has data-resizable)

selectable.description: data-selectable[='single|multi'] on root: row click (de)selects; checkboxes, shift-ranges and the header select-all work regardless

align.description: Cell alignment: left, center, right (data-align attribute; th values are mirrored to their column)

format.description: Number format: number, currency, percent, date (data-format). Cells with data-value are rendered via Intl using data-locale/data-currency on the root

multi-sort.description: data-multi-sort on root: shift+click accumulates secondary sorts (numbered badges on headers)

sort-cycle.description: data-sort-cycle='tristate' on root: third header click clears the sort and restores original order

editable.description: data-editable on root enables inline editing (dblclick / Enter / F2). Restrict columns by marking th data-editable, exclude with data-readonly

tree.description: data-tree on root: rows with data-level form a treegrid; parents get expanders, sorting stays within siblings, aggregates roll up descendants

groupable.description: data-groupable on root: group-header rows toggle their section collapsed/expanded

reorderable.description: data-reorderable on root: rows drag via [data-part='drag-handle'] (pointer or arrow keys); tree rows reorder among siblings with subtrees attached

col-reorderable.description: data-col-reorderable on root: drag column headers to rearrange columns (Alt+Arrow with keyboard focus)

resizable.description: data-resizable on root: drag the injected header handles (Ctrl+Shift+Arrow with keyboard focus); th data-min-width/data-max-width clamp in px

sticky-header.description: data-sticky-header on root: thead sticks while the root scrolls (cap height with --table-max-height)

sticky-footer.description: data-sticky-footer on root: tfoot sticks to the bottom of the scrolling root

navigable.description: data-navigable on root (implied by data-editable): roving-focus grid keyboard navigation (arrows, Home/End, PageUp/Down, Space selects, Enter/F2 edits or toggles)

responsive.description: data-responsive='stack' re-renders rows as labelled cards below the data-stack-below breakpoint (sm|md|lg or px, default md); any data-responsive value enables data-hide-below column hiding

persist.description: data-persist='key' on root: sorts, filters, column widths and visibility survive reloads via localStorage

locale.description: data-locale on root for Intl formatting (defaults to the document language)

currency.description: data-currency on root for currency-formatted cells

negatives.description: data-negatives='red|parens|both' on root: negative numbers render red and/or in accounting parentheses

required_attrs: Proper table semantics (table, thead, tbody, tr, th, td)
Tree mode adds role="treegrid" to the table element plus aria-level/aria-expanded to rows (controller-managed)
Expander and row-toggle buttons carry aria-expanded (controller-managed)
aria-label on filter inputs, drag handles, and expander buttons

keyboard.Click header / Enter / Space on focused: toggle sort direction on sortable columns (Shift adds a secondary sort when data-multi-sort)
keyboard.Arrow keys / Home / End / PageUp / PageD: move cell focus in navigable grids (Ctrl+Home/End jumps to grid corners)
keyboard.Enter / F2 on a cell: start inline editing (editable) or toggle a tree/group row
keyboard.Space on a row cell: toggle row selection; toggles group headers
keyboard.Ctrl/Cmd+A: select all visible rows in selectable navigable grids
keyboard.ArrowUp / ArrowDown on a drag handle: move the row among its siblings
